MINI MINUTES: DEPT. 218 Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Appearances:
Ivy Tseng, Esq. for and with Plaintiff SFGC Assoc., LLC., represented by their agent Mark DeAmbrosi.
Lien Lac, Esq. representing the Defendant, L.F. George Jewelry Corp., represented by their agent Henry Lam.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

Case settled, parties enter into a signed agreement for "stipulation and order", which was filed.
Trial date of DEC-14-2009 is vacated.
